notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Tristan Gray out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach out at 1st.
